name: human-to-action
description: Preserve human intent and route prompt refinement to the right destination.

interface.shortDescription: Turn human intent into agent-ready action
interface.longDescription: Adds a lightweight context preflight, refines same-task instructions internally, and creates paste-ready prompts only for handoffs, new tasks, other agents, or explicit artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Refine this instruction internally and continue
Audit this agent prompt without rewriting it
Create a paste-ready prompt for another agent
